UCL Research Study  ·  September 2026

Minds
in Motion

How does the space around you shape the way you think, move, and feel? Join a UCL experiment at the frontier of neuroarchitecture.

  • Navigate a specially designed architectural environment at UCL PEARL
  • Wear lightweight biosensors recording movement and physiological responses
  • No experience required — all adults aged 18+ are welcome to apply
✦  A follow-up to 100 Minds in Motion — as featured by MIT and UCL News (September 2024)

Scan to sign up — or visit:

bit.ly/mindsinmotion

Led by Prof. Hugo Spiers & Dr Fiona Zisch
UCL Experimental Psychology · UCL Bartlett

Questions?  [study email address]
